name: Rodeo Bull Ride
description: Third-person rodeo bull ride — key 1 = buck, key 2 = spin, key 3 = thrown off, key 4 = wave hat, key 5 = barrel turn, key 6 = rabbit appears, key 7 = arena fire

base.default: A cowboy in a wide-brimmed hat, chaps and boots, seen from behind, gripping the rope one-handed on the back of a massive bucking bull in a dusty floodlit rodeo arena. The world contains EXACTLY ONE tall metal chute gate on the left at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE packed grandstand of spectators on the right at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE blue barrel on the churned dirt straight ahead at a fixed position. Kicked-up dust hanging in the air, a scuffed dirt floor, advertising banners along the arena fence, bright stadium floodlights against a deep evening sky. Sunset-lit dusty arena, photorealistic, cinematic depth of field.

default.static: Third-person view from behind and slightly above the cowboy, his back and the bull's shoulders centred in frame at constant size — never a first-person view. Neither the rider nor the camera moves; look-input is the only camera motion, arcing around the stationary centred rider while held.
default.dynamic: Strict third-person rear view from close behind and above the cowboy, his back and the bull's heaving shoulders filling frame centre — never first-person. It holds a fixed position behind the pair and tracks them across the dirt; look-input becomes the bull changing heading.

default.static: The bull stands snorting and pawing the dirt in the chute area, muscles twitching under its hide and dust drifting around its hooves, the cowboy settled low over its shoulders with the rope gripped tight and his free arm raised for balance.
default.dynamic: The bull charges forward across the arena in a heavy pounding gallop, throwing up clods of dirt, the cowboy pitching and rocking with each stride as he clings to the rope, his free arm swinging wide as the fence, chute and grandstand slide past.

events.name: Buck
events.detail: The bull explodes into a violent buck, kicking its hind legs high and slamming its front hooves back down, hurling the cowboy up out of the saddle and back down again as dust bursts off the dirt; he snaps his free arm out, clings to the rope and rides it out.

events.name: Spin
events.detail: The bull drops its shoulder and spins hard in a tight circle, whipping around again and again with its hooves tearing at the dirt, the cowboy leaning against the turn and fighting to stay centred over its back, then it straightens out of the spin.

events.name: Thrown Off
events.detail: The bull heaves in a savage twist and flings the cowboy clear off its back; he tumbles through the air and hits the dirt in a rolling sprawl, dust flying up around him, then scrambles up onto his feet as the bull veers away.

events.name: Wave Hat
events.detail: The cowboy sweeps his wide-brimmed hat off with his free hand and waves it high over his head in a showy flourish toward the roaring grandstand, then settles it back down and re-grips for balance.

events.name: Barrel Turn
events.detail: The bull thunders up to the blue barrel ahead and cuts a hard, tight turn around it, hooves carving a spray of dirt as it whips around the marker, the cowboy leaning deep into the turn, then it powers back out across the arena.

events.name: Rabbit Appears
events.detail: The cowboy stays mounted on the bull, unchanged in pose and position, while ahead across the arena dirt a small brown rabbit hops out onto the churned ground, pausing with its ears twitching, then hopping a little further and settling.

events.name: Arena Fire
events.detail: The cowboy stays mounted on the bull, unchanged in pose and position, while flames erupt across the arena dirt ahead of him — a spreading blaze of orange fire and thick black smoke rising from the ground in the middle of the arena, heat rippling the air above the burning dirt.

scene.jumpPrompt: The bull launches upward off all four hooves, leaping clear of the arena dirt with the cowboy rising with it, then drops back down and lands heavily in a spray of dust.
scene.crouchPrompt: The camera lowers toward the arena floor as the cowboy hunches down low over the bull's shoulders, tucking into a compact, braced stance; the viewpoint sinks smoothly to a low, near-ground vantage and settles there, close to the churned dirt.
scene.standPrompt: The cowboy rises back up out of the crouch, straightening tall over the bull's back as the camera lifts smoothly back to its normal above-and-behind vantage.
